Mechanism of Action* (comma separated): Supplies calcium ions for bone mineralization,Increases intestinal calcium and phosphate absorption,Neutralizes gastric acid,Provides zinc for enzymatic and immune functions
Primary Use: Calcium deficiency, osteoporosis,Vitamin D deficiency, bone disorders,Antacid, constipation,Zinc deficiency, immune support
Warnings / Precautions*: Keep the medicine out of reach of children
Product Description*: Appropriate overages of vitamins added to compensate for loss on storage
Storage Condition*: Store in a cool,dry & dark place.Protect from light & moisture at a temperature not exceeding 30°C

Mechanism of Action* (comma separated): Paracetamol inhibits prostaglandin synthesis in the central nervous system, reducing pain perception and lowering fever.
Primary Use: Relief of mild to moderate pain &Treatment of fever
Warnings / Precautions*: Taking more than daily dose of paracetamol may cause serious liver damage or allergic reaction. Not to be sold by retail without the prescription of a registered medical practitioner.Keep the medicine out of reach of children
Storage Condition*: Store in a cool,dry place below 25°C.Protect from direct light and moisture
